svg.text: Single fixed future-nullifier leaf, Poisson future storage-key arrivals, one new key per minute on average.
P(collision by day t) = 1 - exp(-1440t / 2^d). Y axis is logarithmic.
Probability that the note's future nullifier leaf is hit (log scale)
For d=30, p50 is about 516848 days and p90 is about 1716932 days under this one-key-per-minute model.
